title: Complicated S
lyrics: It's complicated, when the night hits the light It's complicated, when you get out for the night Under your own strife I know it's hard to look at yourself in the positive Because the day after day after day, you said mostly negative One day, you'll see it that way Until then, you're just complicating this whole thing Your own inner light, just dimming Can't see your own beauty I know it gets complicated I know it gets complicated To think that you're your own worst enemy To think that you're your own downfall Eventually, you'll stop it here Be thankful for it all Complicated complications of me Complicated complications of you Complicated baggage you Complicated hand of you Complicated where we coming from Man, we've been here for Yeah, almost four decades in the case And now, we cannot seem to Erase from the past the things that made us Just a shattered thing on the ground But I'm telling you, we can rise above it all Rise above it all We can rise above this Complicated complications ain't that complicated Complicated when you're kind Complicated when you're divine When you're fine like your boss Now I'm putting names out there, no deeming I'm just telling you You're bound to see it this way eventually You're bound to see it this way eventually And you'll wonder why it took so long To see the beauty in me

lyricsSegments.text: It's complicated, when the night hits the light It's complicated, when you get out for the night
Under your own strife
I know it's hard to look at yourself in the positive
Because the day after day after day, you said mostly negative
One day, you'll see it that way
Until then, you're just complicating this whole thing
Your own inner light, just dimming
Can't see your own beauty
I know it gets complicated
I know it gets complicated
To think that you're your own worst enemy
To think that you're your own downfall
Eventually, you'll stop it here
Be thankful for it all
Complicated complications of me
Complicated complications of you
Complicated baggage you
Complicated hand of you
Complicated where we coming from
Man, we've been here for
Yeah, almost four decades in the case
And now, we cannot seem to
Erase from the past the things that made us
Just a shattered thing on the ground
But I'm telling you, we can rise above it all
Rise above it all
We can rise above this
Complicated complications ain't that complicated
Complicated when you're kind
Complicated when you're divine
When you're fine like your boss
Now I'm putting names out there, no deeming
I'm just telling you
You're bound to see it this way eventually
You're bound to see it this way eventually
And you'll wonder why it took so long
To see the beauty in me
